title: FiercyMoney
description: The Most Complete & Stylish Economy System for Your Minecraft World!
body:
🪙 **Fiercy Money** — Russian Currency Addon 💎
The Most Complete & Stylish Economy System for Your Minecraft World! ✨

✨ **Welcome to a World of Realistic Economy**! This mod adds genuine Russian currency, bank cards, jobs with salaries, and even casino games to your Minecraft! Build your financial empire today! ✨

📦 What's Inside? A Wealth of Features Awaits!
💵 **CASH**

> Fully realistic banknotes and coins you can hold in your hand and use for trade!

> Banknotes: 5000₽, 1000₽, 500₽, 200₽, 100₽, 50₽

🏦 **BANKING SYSTEM** 🔒

> Keep your capital safe and secure!

> Deposit and withdraw money from your card at any time!

> No more carrying stacks of cash around!

⚡ **Bank Commands**:

- /money — Check your cash balance
- /bank balance — View your bank account balance
- /bank transfer <player> <amount> — Transfer money to other players
- /createaccount — Create a bank account (if card is lost)
- /issuecard — Get a bank card (admin command)

💼 **JOBS & SALARIES** 👷‍♂️

Earn money through honest work!

👷‍♂️ **Loader Job**:

> To start, spawn an NPC with - /jobs spawn_loader_npc

> Build a delivery point and a drop-off point

🎯 Fully Configurable Salary in the world config file!

👑 **FACTION SYSTEM** (NEW!) 🚩

Create your own business or guild and pay your employees!

- /faction create <name> <salary> — Create your faction
- /faction delete <name> — Delete a faction
- /faction invite <player> <name> — Invite a player
- /faction kick <player> <name> — Kick a player
- /faction setsalary <name> <salary> — Change the salary
- /faction paysalaries — Instantly pay everyone's salary!
- /faction info | /faction list — Get info and see a list of factions
- /f join <faction> — Join a faction as a player
- /f leave — Leave your current faction
⚙️ Configurable period for salary payments (in minutes) in the configs!
🎰 **CASINO & GAMBLING** 🎲

Test your luck and hit the jackpot!

- Dice: /dice <bet> <number> — roll the dice for luck!
- Dice Duel: /diceduel <player> <bet> — challenge a friend!
- /diceaccept - Accept a dice duel challenge
- /dicedeny - Deny a dice duel challenge
- Lottery Tickets — buy a ticket and win millions!
- Coin Flip: /coinflip <bet> <1|2> — where 1 (Heads), 2 (Tails)!
- Player Coin Flip: /coinflipp <player> <bet> <choice> — Challenge a player!
- /coinaccept - Accept a coin flip challenge
- /coindeny - Deny a coin flip challenge
- /casinozone <name> <radius> — Create a casino area (admin)
🏡 **VISUAL PLOT SYSTEM** 🏠

Buy and sell land like a true tycoon!

- /plotcreate <name> <price> — Create a plot for sale
- /plotbuy — Buy a plot you like
- /plotsell — Put your plot up for sale
- /plotdel <name> — Delete a plot (admin)

⚙️ **CONFIGURATION** 🔧

_Everything is fully customizable for your server! Salaries, pay periods, limits—it's all in your hands!_

💎 Install Fiercy Money Today and Transform Your Survival World into a Thrilling Economic Strategy Game! 💎

_P.S. Don't forget to configure the config files for your server! Good luck and get rich!_ 🍀💰
